events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

Key call: the low suction pressure + high superheat combo matches all three candidates in this classic FD triple, but the near-normal subcooling reading rules out undercharge (undercharge would depress subcooling too). That leaves TXV starving or a dirty/restricted evaporator coil as the likely cause — neither of which was isolated on site (no air-side temperature split or sight-glass/TXV check performed). Decision: **fail** (diagnostics incomplete/out of tolerance as interpreted), risk **medium** (real danger is a tech "fixing" this by adding charge and overcharging a functioning refrigerant circuit).
